evidence_summary: Generic archived-page notice without a surviving programme identity.
The notification establishes Startup India Fund of Funds 2.0 and references the earlier 1.0 structure.
The directory states that it covers initiatives from multiple Central ministries and departments.
DPIIT is the issuing department; the notification separately specifies startup recognition and 80-IAC certification.
A distinct form collects information for Section 80-IAC eligibility certification.
The Inter-Ministerial Board, convened by DPIIT, validates startups for the 80-IAC tax benefit.
The Startup India listing contains programmes and challenges whose issuer must be checked individually.
The page presents DPIIT recognition first and a separate post-recognition 80-IAC application.
NSWS hosts the Registration as a Startup application for DPIIT recognition.
DPIIT coordinates implementation of the Startup India initiative.
